sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 델 테크놀로지스는 3분기 매출 270억 달러를 기록하며 AI 서버 수요 급증에 힘입어 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 11% 증가한 270억 달러로 역대 3분기 최고치를 기록했습니다.
AI 모멘텀 가속화로 3분기 AI 서버 주문액 123억 달러, 연초 이후 누적 주문액 300억 달러를 달성했습니다.

businessChanges.text: AI 서버 수요 증가에 따라 연간 AI 출하량 가이던스를 250억 달러로 상향 조정했습니다.
3분기 중 주식 환매 및 배당을 통해 총 16억 달러를 주주에게 환원했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.28달러, 비일반회계기준(non-GAAP) 희석 EPS는 17% 증가한 2.59달러를 기록했습니다.
인프라 솔루션 그룹 내 네트워킹 부문 매출은 101억 달러로 전년 대비 37% 성장했습니다.
4분기 매출 가이던스 중간값은 315억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 32% 성장을 예상합니다.

watchItems.text: 현재 184억 달러 규모의 백로그와 5분기 파이프라인이 실제 매출로 전환되는 속도와 수익성 추이를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991earnings8kq3fy26.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Dell Technologies Delivers Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results ROUND ROCK, Texas — November 25, 2025 — Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces financial results for its fiscal 2026 third quarter and provides guidance for its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full year. The company also names David Kennedy its chief financial officer on a permanent basis. Third-Quarter Summary • Record third-quarter revenue of $27.0 billion, up 11% year over year • Diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $2.28, up 39% year over year, and record third-quarter non-GAAP diluted EPS of $2.59, up 17% • Cash flow from operations of $1.2 billion “In the third quarter we delivered record Q3 revenue of $27 billion, record Q3 profitab  Normalized numeric aliases: $27.0 billion = 270억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $27 billion = 270억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $27.0 = 27.0달러; $2.28 = 2.28달러; $2.59 = 2.59달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $27 = 27달러.

ial officer, Dell Technologies. “FY26 will be another record year, and we’re raising our AI shipment guidance to roughly $25 billion, up over 150% year over year, and revenue guidance to $111.7 billion, up 17%.” “AI momentum is accelerating in the second half of the year, leading to record AI server orders of $12.3 billion and an unprecedented $30 billion in orders year to date,” said Jeff Clarke, vice chairman and chief operating officer, Dell Technologies. “Our five-quarter pipeline is multiples of our $18.4 billion backlog with a mix of neocloud, sovereign and enterprise customers. Dell is winning in AI because of our unique ability to engineer bespoke high-performance solutions, rapidly deploy large, complex clusters,   Normalized numeric aliases: $25 billion = 250억 달러; $111.7 billion = 1,117억 달러; $12.3 billion = 123억 달러; $30 billion = 300억 달러; $18.4 billion = 184억 달러; $14.1 billion = 141억 달러; $25 = 25달러; $111.7 = 111.7달러; $30 = 30달러; $12.3 = 12.3달러; $18.4 = 18.4달러; $14.1 = 14.1달러.

d Networking revenue: $10.1 billion, up 37% • Storage revenue: $4.0 billion, down 1% • Record third-quarter operating income: $1.7 billion, up 16% year over year Client Solutions Group (CSG) • Revenue: $12.5 billion, up 3% year over year • Commercial Client revenue: $10.6 billion, up 5% • Consumer revenue: $1.9 billion, down 7% • Operating income: $748 million, flat year over year Capital Return Dell Technologies returned $1.6 billion to shareholders in the third quarter through share repurchases and dividends. Year to date, the company has returned $5.3 billion to shareholders and repurchased over 39 million shares. 1   Normalized numeric aliases: $10.1 billion = 101억 달러; $4.0 billion = 40억 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $12.5 billion = 125억 달러; $10.6 billion = 106억 달러; $1.9 billion = 19억 달러; $748 million = 7억 4,800만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; 39 million = 3,900만 달러; $10.1 = 10.1달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러; $112.2 = 112.2달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $111.2 = 111.2달러; Readable Korean unit: 53억 달러.

to be $8.38 at the midpoint, up 31% year over year, and non-GAAP diluted EPS to be $9.92 at the midpoint, up 22% • Fourth-quarter FY26 revenue expected between $31.0 billion and $32.0 billion, up 32% year over year at the midpoint of $31.5 billion • Fourth-quarter FY26 GAAP diluted EPS expected to be $3.05 at the midpoint, up 42% year over year, and non-GAAP diluted EPS to be $3.50 at the midpoint, up 31% 2 Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results Three Months Ended Nine Months Ended October 31, 2025 November 1, 2024 Change October 31,   Normalized numeric aliases: $31.0 billion = 310억 달러; $32.0 billion = 320억 달러; $31.5 billion = 315억 달러; $8.38 = 8.38달러; $9.92 = 9.92달러; $31.0 = 31.0달러; $32.0 = 32.0달러; $31.5 = 31.5달러; $3.50 = 3.50달러; $1,548 = 1,548달러; $1,553 = 1,553달러; 80,159 million = 801억 5,900만 달러; 4,078 million = 40억 7,800만 달러; 1,172 million = 11억 7,200만 달러; 3,677 million = 36억 7,700만 달러; 3,044 million = 30억 4,400만 달러; 1,553 million = 15억 5,300만 달러; 6,511 million = 65억 1,100만 달러.
